entities.name: SkillNest
entities.description: EdTech platform in India providing live online computer literacy, coding, and AI courses for middle schoolers.

entities.name: Aanandita Uplopwar
entities.role: Founder, Coordinating Educator, and Lead Instructor at SkillNest
entities.description: Lead educator who designs the project-based curriculum and teaches cohorts at SkillNest.

entities.name: Bhilai Nagar
entities.description: The major urban area adjacent to Durg where SkillNest was established.

entities.name: National Education Policy 2020
entities.description: India's modern educational policy that mandates coding and practical skills starting in Class 6.

entities.name: MIT Scratch
entities.description: A block-based visual programming language designed for children to learn computational thinking.

entities.name: Microsoft Excel
entities.description: A spreadsheet application used to teach students arithmetic formulas, calculations, and data visualization.

entities.name: Microsoft PowerPoint
entities.description: A presentation program used to teach kids slide master structures, design pacing, and public speaking prep.

entities.name: Canva
entities.description: A graphic design tool used to teach students visual communication and design basics.

entities.name: Touch Typing
entities.description: The ability to type using muscle memory without looking at the keyboard.

entities.name: Cyber Safety / Digital Hygiene
entities.description: Internet security rules including strong password practices, phishing identification, and browser cookies configuration.
